root_text.an10.102:1.1: “Sattime, bhikkhave, bojjhaṅgā bhāvitā bahulīkatā tisso vijjā paripūrenti.
root_text.an10.102:1.3: Satisambojjhaṅgo, dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgo, vīriyasambojjhaṅgo, pītisambojjhaṅgo, passaddhisambojjhaṅgo, samādhisambojjhaṅgo, upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo—
root_text.an10.102:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, satta bojjhaṅgā bhāvitā bahulīkatā tisso vijjā paripūrenti.
root_text.an10.102:1.6: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu anekavihitaṁ pubbenivāsaṁ anussarati,
root_text.an10.102:1.7: seyyathidaṁ—ekampi jātiṁ dvepi jātiyo tissopi jātiyo …pe… iti sākāraṁ sauddesaṁ anekavihitaṁ pubbenivāsaṁ anussarati.
root_text.an10.102:1.8: Dibbena cakkhunā visuddhena atikkantamānusakena …pe… yathākammūpage satte pajānāti.
root_text.an10.102:1.10: Ime kho, bhikkhave, satta bojjhaṅgā bhāvitā bahulīkatā imā tisso vijjā paripūrentī”ti.

translation_text.an10.102:1.1: “Mendicants, when the seven awakening factors are developed and cultivated they fulfill three knowledges.
translation_text.an10.102:1.3: The awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.an10.102:1.4: When these seven awakening factors are developed and cultivated they fulfill three knowledges.
translation_text.an10.102:1.6: It’s when a mendicant recollects their many kinds of past lives.
translation_text.an10.102:1.7: That is: one, two, three, four, five, ten, twenty, thirty, forty, fifty, a hundred, a thousand, a hundred thousand rebirths; many eons of the world contracting, many eons of the world expanding, many eons of the world contracting and expanding. They recollect their many kinds of past lives, with features and details.
translation_text.an10.102:1.8: With clairvoyance that is purified and surpasses the human, they understand how sentient beings pass on according to their deeds.
translation_text.an10.102:1.9: They realize the undefiled freedom of heart and freedom by wisdom in this very life, and live having realized it with their own insight due to the ending of defilements.
translation_text.an10.102:1.10: When those seven awakening factors are developed and cultivated they fulfill these three knowledges.”
